title: Audio: Sliding Window — the family map

cues.label: The wasteful nested loop
cues.headline: Every window re-added from scratch
cues.narration: A size-three window over eight numbers, re-summed at every start, is O(n·k) work.

cues.label: The overlap insight
cues.headline: Only the two ends change
cues.narration: Adjacent windows share their middle; only one element leaves and one enters.

cues.label: Fixed-size branch
cues.headline: Width pinned by k
cues.narration: The left boundary trails the right by a constant gap and they slide in lockstep.

cues.label: Variable-size branch
cues.headline: The window breathes
cues.narration: Right expands greedily; left shrinks only when a rule breaks — longest-no-repeat.

cues.label: Amortized linearity
cues.headline: Count travel, not nested loops
cues.narration: Each index enters once and leaves at most once, so total pointer travel is O(n).

cues.label: When it fails
cues.headline: Contiguous + monotonic only
cues.narration: Non-contiguous answers or negative numbers break the window's monotonic promise.

cues.label: Recognition & template
cues.headline: Fingerprint and skeleton
cues.narration: Trigger phrases plus the fixed skeleton: two boundaries, repair the ends, record.
